name: Shot Mode Decision Binary
description: Binary evaluation of call 1 output — mode selection and reference handling for shot_image_prompt pipeline.

questions.question: Is the chosen mode correct? Shot 1 must use 'image_text_to_image' or 'text_to_image'. Shot 2+ should DEFAULT to 'edit_previous_shot' unless the composition changes drastically (wide→extreme close-up on detail, entirely new location). Detail/mood shots with no characters should use 'text_to_image'.

For edit_previous_shot: does newCharacterRefs include ONLY characters NOT visible in the previous shot? Characters already in the previous shot must NOT be listed. If mode is not edit_previous_shot, answer YES.
For image_text_to_image: does newCharacterRefs include ALL characters and settings visible in this shot? Every visible subject must have a reference. If mode is not image_text_to_image, answer YES.
Does every refId in newCharacterRefs exactly match one of the available_references? No fabricated, misspelled, or non-existent refIds.

Does existingSubjects correctly list characters/settings already visible in the previous shot? These should be described by name in the prompt, not by image number. If shot 1 or text_to_image, answer YES.
Is the output valid JSON with required fields: mode, newCharacterRefs (array), existingSubjects (array)?
